'''ât-dh-b''' ('''katadhab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quirk|quirk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quirk|quirk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-dh-b
|-
! Lemma
| katadhab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitadhab|thitadhab]] || [[word:jitadhab|jitadhab]] || [[word:shitadhab|shitadhab]] || [[word:kitadhab|kitadhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutadhab|thuthutadhab]] || [[word:jujutadhab|jujutadhab]] || [[word:shushutadhab|shushutadhab]] || [[word:kukutadhab|kukutadhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutadhab|thutadhab]] || [[word:jutadhab|jutadhab]] || [[word:shutadhab|shutadhab]] || [[word:kutadhab|kutadhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutadhab|thutadhab]] || [[word:jutadhab|jutadhab]] || [[word:shutadhab|shutadhab]] || [[word:kutadhab|kutadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetadhab|thetadhab]] || [[word:jetadhab|jetadhab]] || [[word:shetadhab|shetadhab]] || [[word:ketadhab|ketadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotadhab|thothotadhab]] || [[word:jojotadhab|jojotadhab]] || [[word:shoshotadhab|shoshotadhab]] || [[word:kokotadhab|kokotadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotadhab|thotadhab]] || [[word:jotadhab|jotadhab]] || [[word:shotadhab|shotadhab]] || [[word:kotadhab|kotadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotadhab|thotadhab]] || [[word:jotadhab|jotadhab]] || [[word:shotadhab|shotadhab]] || [[word:kotadhab|kotadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtadhab|thĂŠtadhab]] || [[word:jĂŠtadhab|jĂŠtadhab]] || [[word:shĂŠtadhab|shĂŠtadhab]] || [[word:kĂŠtadhab|kĂŠtadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatadhab|thathatadhab]] || [[word:jajatadhab|jajatadhab]] || [[word:shashatadhab|shashatadhab]] || [[word:kakatadhab|kakatadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatadhab|thatadhab]] || [[word:jatadhab|jatadhab]] || [[word:shatadhab|shatadhab]] || [[word:katadhab|katadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatadhab|thatadhab]] || [[word:jatadhab|jatadhab]] || [[word:shatadhab|shatadhab]] || [[word:katadhab|katadhab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatadhab|shatadhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatadhab|goshatadhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatadhab|gokishatadhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatadhabnĂŒ|shatadhabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatadhabnknĂŒ|goshatadhabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadhabnĂŒ|gokishatadhabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatadhabshĂ«|shatadhabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkshĂ«|goshatadhabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatadhabshĂ«|gokishatadhabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadhabro|shatadhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkro|goshatadhabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadhabro|gokishatadhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadhabmu|shatadhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkmu|goshatadhabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadhabmu|gokishatadhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatadhabsher|shatadhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatadhabnksher|goshatadhabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatadhabsher|gokishatadhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatadhabng|shatadhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkng|goshatadhabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatadhabng|gokishatadhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatadhabya|shatadhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkya|goshatadhabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatadhabya|gokishatadhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatadhabyam|shatadhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkyam|goshatadhabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatadhabyam|gokishatadhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatadhabnĂŒshĂ«|shatadhabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatadhabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatadhabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatadhabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatadhabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadhabnĂŒro|shatadhabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadhabnknĂŒro|goshatadhabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadhabnĂŒro|gokishatadhabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadhabnĂŒmu|shatadhabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadhabnknĂŒmu|goshatadhabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadhabnĂŒmu|gokishatadhabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatadhabshĂ«nĂŒ|shatadhabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatadhabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadhabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatadhabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadhabshĂ«ro|shatadhabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkshĂ«ro|goshatadhabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadhabshĂ«ro|gokishatadhabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadhabshĂ«mu|shatadhabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkshĂ«mu|goshatadhabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadhabshĂ«mu|gokishatadhabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatadhabronĂŒ|shatadhabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkronĂŒ|goshatadhabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadhabronĂŒ|gokishatadhabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatadhabroshĂ«|shatadhabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkroshĂ«|goshatadhabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatadhabroshĂ«|gokishatadhabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatadhabromu|shatadhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkromu|goshatadhabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatadhabromu|gokishatadhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatadhabmunĂŒ|shatadhabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkmunĂŒ|goshatadhabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatadhabmunĂŒ|gokishatadhabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatadhabmushĂ«|shatadhabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkmushĂ«|goshatadhabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatadhabmushĂ«|gokishatadhabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatadhabmuro|shatadhabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatadhabnkmuro|goshatadhabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatadhabmuro|gokishatadhabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
